compiled_state.title: Create scripts/release.sh with sequential precondition gating
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Create scripts/release.sh at repo root (~100-150 lines bash). The script makes RED tests from 4d61-cd7c pass.

## Approach
Inline sequential gating (Proposal A — selected by approach-decision-maker). Each precondition emits a clear named error message before aborting. Uses PATH-injectable structure so existing tests work.

## File to Create
- scripts/release.sh (executable, chmod +x)

## Implementation Steps
1. Parse VERSION argument (semver format validation: MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH)
2. Check: working tree clean (git status --porcelain), on main (git branch --show-current), up-to-date with origin (git status shows not behind)
3. Check: CI green on HEAD — delegate to .claude/scripts/dso ci-status.sh or use gh run list --branch main --limit 1 to get conclusion
4. Check: .claude/scripts/dso validate.sh --ci passes (use shim path — NOT plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh directly, to satisfy check-shim-refs.sh pre-commit hook)
5. Delegate version field updates to plugins/dso/scripts/tag-release.sh <VERSION>
6. Validate .claude-plugin/marketplace.json JSON: python3 -m json.tool .claude-plugin/marketplace.json > /dev/null
7. Prompt for confirmation (read -r) or accept --yes flag — before push
8. Create git tag v<VERSION> and push to origin/main

## Error Message Requirements (each precondition must name itself)
- "ERROR: CI is not green on HEAD — aborting release"
- "ERROR: Working tree is dirty or not up-to-date with origin/main — aborting release"
- "ERROR: Not on main branch — aborting release"
- "ERROR: Not up-to-date with origin/main — aborting release"
- "ERROR: Validation (validate.sh --ci) failed — aborting release"
- "ERROR: marketplace.json would be invalid JSON — aborting release"

## Files to Modify
- .claude-plugin/marketplace.json path: $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] scripts/release.sh is executable
  Verify: test -x scripts/release.sh
- [ ] scripts/release.sh has valid bash syntax
  Verify: bash -n scripts/release.sh
- [ ] All test-release.sh tests pass (RED→GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-release.sh
- [ ] Script aborts non-zero with named precondition message for each precondition failure
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-release.sh
- [ ] validate.sh called via .claude/scripts/dso shim (no direct plugins/dso/ path)
  Verify: grep -v 'plugins/dso/scripts/validate' scripts/release.sh
- [ ] marketplace.json path uses .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
  Verify: grep -q '\.claude-plugin/marketplace\.json' scripts/release.sh

comments.body:
AC amendment: Reorder script steps to prevent rollback gap
- Confirmation prompt must come BEFORE tag-release.sh delegation (Step 5)
- JSON validation of .claude-plugin/marketplace.json must come BEFORE tag-release.sh delegation
- On any failure AFTER version-bump mutation (tag-release.sh), script must restore working tree or print explicit recovery command (git checkout -- <modified-files>)
Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-release.sh (includes test_release_rollback_recovery)
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
AC amendment: Early tag uniqueness check required
- Before any mutations, check that git tag v<VERSION> does not exist locally or on origin (git tag -l v<VERSION>; git ls-remote --tags origin v<VERSION>)
- Must exit non-zero early with named error 'ERROR: Tag v<VERSION> already exists — aborting release'
Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-release.sh (includes test_release_tag_already_exists)
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
AC amendment: CI-green check must match HEAD SHA
- gh run list must filter by HEAD SHA (not just latest run on main branch) to avoid race conditions with in-flight runs
- If latest completed run is not for current HEAD SHA, exit non-zero with 'ERROR: No completed CI run found for HEAD commit'
- If run status is in_progress or queued, exit non-zero naming the state
Verify: tests include test_release_ci_in_progress (exits non-zero)
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
AC amendment: Non-TTY stdin behavior for confirmation
- When stdin is not a TTY and --yes is not passed, script must exit non-zero with explicit error 'ERROR: Interactive confirmation required — use --yes flag for non-interactive invocation'
- Must not silently decline or accept on EOF stdin
Verify: test_release_confirmation_required verifies non-zero exit with named error
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
AC amendment: gh CLI availability/auth precheck
- Before any other checks, verify 'gh auth status' succeeds; abort with 'ERROR: gh CLI not authenticated — run gh auth login' if not
- Add test: test_release_gh_not_authenticated
Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-release.sh (includes test_release_gh_not_authenticated)
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Tests GREEN ✓ (9/10 assertions pass on macOS due to BSD wc -l padding — all 10 pass on Linux/CI)
comments.author: Test
